stem: Under MAS Notice FAA-N06, which type of account is a financial adviser absolutely prohibited from opening or maintaining?

options.A: A joint account held by two natural persons
options.B: An account for a Singapore Government entity
options.C: An anonymous account or an account in a fictitious name
options.D: An account for a company listed on the Singapore Exchange

explanation: 第 6.1 段明确规定财务顾问不得开立或维持匿名账户或假名账户。其余选项均为可合法服务的客户类型,联名账户(A)按 6.35 对每名持有人分别做 CDD,政府实体(B)与上市公司(D)分别受 6.11、6.15 简化处理。

stem: FAA-N06 is issued pursuant to which provision?

options.A: Section 27B of the Monetary Authority of Singapore Act 1970
options.D: Section 2(1) of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012

explanation: 第 1.1 段载明 Notice 依 MAS Act 1970 第 27B 条发布。CDSA s48 是关于通风报信(tipping-off),Insurance Act s8 关于直接寿险牌照,PDPA s2(1) 是个人数据定义,均非本 Notice 的授权依据。

stem: Which of the following is NOT one of the triggers requiring a financial adviser to perform CDD under paragraph 6.3?

options.A: The financial adviser establishes business relations with a customer
options.B: There is a suspicion of money laundering or terrorism financing
options.C: The financial adviser has doubts about the veracity or adequacy of information previously obtained
options.D: The customer makes a complaint about service quality

explanation: 第 6.3 段列举三种触发情形:建立业务关系(A)、怀疑洗钱/恐怖融资(B)、对先前信息真实性或充分性存疑(C)。服务投诉(D)不是 CDD 触发条件。

stem: When identifying an individual customer, what is the minimum information a financial adviser must obtain under paragraph 6.5?

options.A: Only the customer's full name and phone number
options.B: Full name (incl. aliases), unique identification number, address, date of birth, and nationality
options.D: The customer's annual income and credit score

explanation: 第 6.5 段要求至少取得全名(含别名)、唯一识别号、住址/营业地址、出生日期及国籍/注册地。A、C、D 均不符合最低识别信息要求。

stem: In which case is a financial adviser NOT required to inquire whether a beneficial owner exists in relation to the customer?

options.A: An individual retail customer with a modest policy
options.B: A private company wholly owned by one family
options.C: A trust set up for estate planning
options.D: An entity listed and traded on the Singapore Exchange

explanation: 第 6.15 段豁免对在新交所上市并交易的实体(D)(以及 Appendix 5A 金融机构等)询问受益所有人。普通个人客户(A)、私人公司(B)、信托(C)仍须识别并核实受益所有人。

stem: By when must a financial adviser generally complete verification of a customer's identity?

options.A: Within 30 days of the first transaction
options.B: Before establishing business relations with the customer
options.D: At the end of each financial year

explanation: 第 6.30 段要求原则上在建立业务关系前完成对客户、受托代理人及受益所有人的身份核实。仅在 6.31–6.32 的有限条件下(不延后即中断正常业务且风险可控)方可先建立关系后尽快核实,并无固定 30 天门槛。

stem: A financial adviser assesses a customer as low risk. In which situation may it still NOT apply simplified CDD measures?

options.A: Where the customer is an Appendix 5B financial institution
options.B: Where the risk analysis is properly documented
options.C: Where the customer or beneficial owner is from a country for which the FATF has called for countermeasures

explanation: 第 7.4 段规定,即使风险评估为低,若客户/受益所有人来自 FATF 呼吁反制的国家、来自 AML/CFT 不足的国家,或怀疑涉及洗钱/恐怖融资,均不得执行简化 CDD。A 属可执行 SDD 的情形(7.5),B、D 不构成禁用条件。

stem: Where a customer is determined to be a politically exposed person (PEP), which enhanced CDD measure is required under paragraph 8.3?

options.B: Obtain senior management approval, establish source of wealth and source of funds, and conduct enhanced monitoring
options.C: Report the PEP to the police within 24 hours
options.D: Waive identity verification because PEPs are public figures

explanation: 第 8.3 段要求对 PEP(及其家庭成员/密切关系人)除一般 CDD 外,取得高管批准建立/继续关系、以合理手段确定财富与资金来源、并进行加强监控。不要求自动终止关系(A),无 24 小时报警义务(C),更不可豁免身份核实(D)。

stem: Which AML/CFT obligation may a financial adviser NOT delegate to a third party it relies upon?

options.C: Obtaining the customer's date of birth
options.D: Ongoing monitoring of business relations with customers

explanation: 第 9.3 段明确规定财务顾问不得依赖第三方进行持续监控(D)。识别与核实(A、B、C)属第 6 段措施,可在符合 9.2 条件下依赖第三方执行,但 FA 仍对自身义务负责(9.5)。

stem: What is the minimum record retention period for CDD information relating to business relations after those relations are terminated?
explanation: 第 10.3 段规定:关于业务关系的 CDD 信息、账户文件、业务往来及分析结果须自业务关系终止后保存至少 5 年;交易相关数据须自交易完成后保存至少 5 年。故为 5 年。

stem: When must a financial adviser submit a suspicious transaction report (STR) to the STRO?

options.A: Only if the transaction exceeds SGD 20,000
options.C: Promptly, regardless of the amount of the transaction, including attempted transactions, with a copy to MAS
options.D: Only at the annual compliance review

explanation: 第 12.2 段要求无论交易金额大小、包括未遂交易,均须立即向 STRO 提交可疑交易报告并抄送 MAS。因此不存在金额门槛(A),未遂交易也须报告(B),且为即时而非年度(D)。

stem: Regarding internal AML/CFT governance, which arrangement does FAA-N06 require a financial adviser to put in place?

options.A: Appoint an AML/CFT compliance officer at the management level
options.B: Outsource all compliance to an external law firm
options.C: Train only newly hired employees once at induction
options.D: Apply the lower of the home and host country AML/CFT standards overseas

explanation: 第 13.10 段要求设立管理层级的 AML/CFT 合规官。培训须对员工/职员/代表定期进行而非仅入职一次(C),境外分支须采用两者中较高标准(13.8)而非较低(D),Notice 未要求将合规全部外包给律所(B)。
